case_title: LEM/RAY PROPERTIES VS. KERRY STOLT et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STOLT, KERRY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOLT, KERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 GEARY ST. #402 S.F., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT STOLT, KERRY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
